title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1 livestream from Moscone West in San Francisco on June 30, 2026 features keynotes and main-stage programming on software factories and AI engineering. The event brings together one of the largest gatherings of AI engineers for live talks and presentations.
writeup: This is the Day 1 livestream of AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, recorded June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco, covering keynotes and main-stage programming on software factories and AI engineering. It matters as one of the largest gatherings of AI engineers, consolidating live talks and presentations in a single stream. The central theme is software factories, framed alongside the broader practice of AI engineering.
